caption: Members of a sports team, wearing grey polo shirts and dark trousers, walk across a paved outdoor area toward the camera. The setting is sunny with palm trees and manicured conical hedges in the background, and a white bus is visible behind them. Several men are seen; one in the foreground wears a black face mask and sunglasses, while others follow behind. The man leading the group carries a white bag, and another carries a black backpack. A white logo featuring a crown and a circular emblem is visible in the upper right of the scene. The text "TEAM HOTEL 12:47" is overlaid in white in the bottom left corner of each shot. As the sequence progresses, the men move forward through the space, with the person in the foreground shifting position and stepping closer to the viewer.
